blocking_findings.required_fix: Resolve the governance status gap: LFA-P28.5 and LFA-P28.6 were still marked pending at review time, so the phase could not be accepted as complete.

notes: DeepSeek did not report a scheduler-loop runtime behavior defect in the extracted root, utility, driver, or artifact modules.
The only blocking finding was the expected phase-order status gap: the post-implementation review ran before P28.5/P28.6 evidence had been written back.

repairs: Recorded the DeepSeek code/evidence review result in this durable evidence file.
Updated the P28 plan row for LFA-P28.5 after focused gates and DeepSeek review completed.
Left LFA-P28.6 pending until the final JSON, whitespace, large-file, full test, and full closeout gates pass.

delta_review.reason: The single blocking item was not a code or evidence inconsistency requiring a code delta; it was the planned pending status before final gate writeback.

decision: PASS for code and extraction evidence after status writeback. Final acceptance remains gated by LFA-P28.6.
